def process_orders(orders: list[dict]) -> dict:
    count = 0
    for order in orders:
        if order["status"] == "pending":
            process(order)
            count += 1
    return {"processed": count}


def analyze_users(users: list[dict]) -> dict:
    active_count = 0
    premium_count = 0
    for user in users:
        if not user["is_active"]:
            continue
        active_count += 1
        if user["tier"] == "premium":
            premium_count += 1
            send_notification(user)
    return {"active": active_count, "premium": premium_count}


def validate_items(items: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    results = []
    for item in items:
        if item["quantity"] > 0:
            result = validate(item)
            results.append(result)
    return results
